title: Candy Recipes - Cobblemon
description: Adds crafting recipes for Cobblemon candies.
body:
This pack adds recipes for the following:

- Exp Candy XS
- Exp Candy S
- Exp Candy M
- Exp Candy L
- Exp Candy XL
- Rare Candy
  
All of the recipes can be found in the image gallery. Each recipe has been carefully designed to feel balanced and rewarding within the progression of the base mod.
